name: auto-agent-protocol
description: MCP wrapper exposing AAP automotive skills as MCP tools. Each tool corresponds to one AAP v0.1 skill and accepts/returns the matching AAP request/response payload.

tools.name: aap_dealer_information
tools.description: Return the dealership profile (legal name, brands, address, hours, contact channels, supported services). Anonymous-safe; no consent required.

tools.name: aap_inventory_facets
tools.description: Return aggregated facets (makes, models, years, conditions, price/mileage ranges) over the dealer's inventory. Anonymous-safe; no consent required.

tools.name: aap_inventory_search
tools.description: Search the dealer's inventory by make, model, year, condition, price, mileage, body type, fuel, drivetrain, VIN, stock, or free-text query. Anonymous-safe; no consent required.

tools.name: aap_inventory_vehicle
tools.description: Return full detail for a specific vehicle by VIN, stock, or vehicle_id, including FTC-compliant pricing fields and (optionally) regional offered_price for a given ZIP. Anonymous-safe; no consent required.

tools.name: aap_lead_general
tools.description: Submit a consented general dealership inquiry (financing, trade-in, service, callback). When customer contact info is included, a ConsentGrant with scope 'general_inquiry' is REQUIRED.

tools.name: aap_lead_vehicle
tools.description: Submit a consented, ADF/CRM-compatible vehicle-specific lead. When customer contact info is included, a ConsentGrant with scope 'vehicle_inquiry' is REQUIRED.

tools.name: aap_lead_appointment
tools.description: Submit a consented appointment request (test drive, showroom visit, handover, phone call, video call, trade-in appraisal). When customer contact info is included, a ConsentGrant with scope 'appointment' is REQUIRED.
